name: Rias Gremory
fact: She is the primary heiress of the Gremory Clan and known across the Underworld as the Crimson-Haired Ruin Princess.

name: Issei Hyoudou
fact: Originally a human, he was reincarnated as a Devil by Rias Gremory using a mutated Pawn piece and later promoted to High-class.

name: Sirzechs Lucifer
fact: He is Rias's older brother and holds the title of Lucifer, acting as the leader of the Four Great Satans.

name: Akeno Himejima
fact: She is Rias Gremory's Queen and is known as the Priestess of Thunder due to her elemental magic.

name: Yuuto Kiba
fact: He is a survivor of the Holy Sword Project and serves Rias Gremory as her Knight.

name: Koneko Toujou
fact: She is a rare Nekomata species who serves Rias Gremory as a Rook, utilizing Senjutsu in combat.

name: Asia Argento
fact: A former human sister who was excommunicated from the Church, she was saved by Issei and reincarnated as a Bishop.

name: Gasper Vladi
fact: He is a half-vampire, half-human Dhampir who possesses a Sacred Gear capable of stopping the time of anyone he sees.

name: Xenovia Quarta
fact: A former Holy Sword wielder sent by the Vatican, she chose to become Rias's Knight after discovering a shocking truth about God.

name: Rossweisse
fact: Formerly Odin's Valkyrie bodyguard, she was left behind in Japan and eventually reincarnated as Rias Gremory's Rook.

name: Sona Sitri
fact: She is the student council president of Kuoh Academy and the next head of the Sitri Clan.

name: Tsubaki Shinra
fact: She is Sona Sitri's Queen and possesses a Sacred Gear that reflects attacks back at her enemies.

name: Serafall Leviathan
fact: Sona's overly affectionate older sister who holds the title of Leviathan and handles Underworld public relations.

name: Sairaorg Bael
fact: Despite being born without the Bael family's signature Power of Destruction, he trained his physical body to reach Ultimate-class strength.

name: Riser Phenex
fact: He is the third son of the Phenex Clan and was briefly engaged to Rias Gremory through an arranged marriage contract.

name: Ravel Phenex
fact: Riser's younger sister who later transfers to Kuoh Academy and becomes Issei Hyoudou's manager and Bishop.

name: Ajuka Beelzebub
fact: One of the Four Great Satans, he is a technical genius responsible for creating the Evil Piece system used to reincarnate Devils.

name: Falbium Asmodeus
fact: He holds the title of Asmodeus and serves as the supreme commander of the Underworld Military Forces.

name: Vali Lucifer
fact: The descendant of the original Lucifer and the current possessor of the Vanishing Dragon, Albion.

name: Kuroka
fact: Koneko's older sister who became a Stray Devil after killing her master to protect Koneko from human experimentation.

name: Zeoticus Gremory
fact: The current head of the Gremory Clan and the father of both Sirzechs Lucifer and Rias Gremory.

name: Venelana Gremory
fact: The mother of Sirzechs and Rias, originally from the Bael Clan, from whom her children inherited the Power of Destruction.

name: Diodora Astaroth
fact: A High-class Devil who allied with the Khaos Brigade and attempted to force Asia Argento into becoming his bishop before being eliminated.

name: Shalba Beelzebub
fact: A descendant of the original Beelzebub who sought to overthrow the current Maou system and recreate the Underworld through war.

name: Katerea Leviathan
fact: A descendant of the original Leviathan who attacked the peace summit in Kuoh Academy town and was defeated by Azazel.
